# We Build

> We Build is a veteran-owned and family-owned commercial construction company serving Charlotte NC, Raleigh NC, the Research Triangle, and the greater Carolinas. Licensed general contractor in North Carolina and South Carolina. U.S. Green Building Council (USGBC) member. Headquarters: 14330 S Lakes Drive, Charlotte NC 28273. Phone: (980) 471-1745.

We Build specializes in commercial construction, commercial upfits, tenant improvements, ground-up commercial buildings, and specialty services including roof coating, drone inspections, green building, and ADA compliance work. 60+ years combined experience. Primary service regions: Charlotte metro (NC), Raleigh / Research Triangle (NC), and upper South Carolina (York + Lancaster counties).

Our sister brand **We Coat** provides commercial roof coating and restoration across the Carolinas and the Detroit Metro area (Michigan). We Build itself is Carolinas-only.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://webuildclt.com/): brand overview, services, featured projects, service areas
- [About](https://webuildclt.com/about): company story, veteran & family ownership, values, USGBC membership
- [Certifications](https://webuildclt.com/about/certifications): NC and SC general contractor licenses, insurance, USGBC membership, drone pilot certifications
- [Portfolio](https://webuildclt.com/portfolio): completed commercial construction projects with photos and case studies
- [Contact](https://webuildclt.com/contact): contact form, phone, office address, map
- [Services Hub](https://webuildclt.com/services): all 16 service offerings with descriptions

## Commercial Construction Services

- [Commercial Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/commercial-construction): ground-up commercial buildings, office parks, mixed-use developments
- [Commercial Upfits](https://webuildclt.com/services/commercial-upfits): interior renovations, office upfits, retail upfits, restaurant build-outs, medical and dental fit-outs
- [Commercial Renovation](https://webuildclt.com/services/commercial-renovation): modernization and refresh of aging commercial properties
- [Office Build-Outs](https://webuildclt.com/services/office-buildouts): custom office space design and construction for Class A, Class B, and suburban office
- [Retail Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/retail-construction): storefronts, shopping center construction, retail tenant improvements
- [Restaurant Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/restaurant-construction): full restaurant build-outs, commercial kitchens, dining rooms, bar-and-beverage
- [Medical Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/medical-construction): medical offices, dental suites, clinics, specialty healthcare facilities
- [Industrial Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/industrial-construction): manufacturing facilities, industrial buildings, production floors
- [Warehouse Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/warehouse-construction): distribution centers, cold storage, logistics facilities, flex space
- [Tenant Improvements](https://webuildclt.com/services/tenant-improvements): leasehold improvement projects, TI allowance build-outs, landlord coordination
- [Brewery Construction](https://webuildclt.com/services/brewery-construction): craft breweries, taprooms, brewpubs, cideries

## Specialty Services

- [General Contractor](https://webuildclt.com/services/general-contractor): full-service general contracting, NCLBGC-licensed
- [Roof Coating](https://webuildclt.com/services/roof-coating): silicone and acrylic roof coatings, commercial roof restoration, waterproofing
- [Green Building](https://webuildclt.com/services/green-building): sustainable construction, USGBC-aligned practices, energy-efficient design
- [ADA Compliance](https://webuildclt.com/services/ada-compliance): ADA-compliant renovations, accessibility upgrades, inclusive design
- [Drone Inspections](https://webuildclt.com/services/drone-inspections): FAA Part 107 certified thermal drone roof inspections and aerial surveys

## Service Areas

### Charlotte Metro (North Carolina)

- [South Charlotte](https://webuildclt.com/areas/south-charlotte): Ballantyne, Pineville, South Park
- [Lake Norman](https://webuildclt.com/areas/lake-norman): Cornelius, Davidson, Huntersville, Mooresville
- [Huntersville](https://webuildclt.com/areas/huntersville): Huntersville, Birkdale Village, Northlake
- [Matthews](https://webuildclt.com/areas/matthews): Matthews, Mint Hill, Indian Trail, Stallings
- [Mooresville](https://webuildclt.com/areas/mooresville): Race City, Lake Norman west shore, Iredell County

Also serving (no dedicated landing page yet): Uptown Charlotte, South End, NoDa, University City, Plaza Midwood, Dilworth, Steele Creek, Waxhaw, Weddington, Marvin, Mecklenburg County broadly.

### Research Triangle (North Carolina)

- [Raleigh NC](https://webuildclt.com/areas/raleigh): Raleigh, Cary, Morrisville, Apex, North Hills, Brier Creek, Research Triangle Park, Wake County
- [Durham NC](https://webuildclt.com/areas/durham): Downtown Durham, American Tobacco District, Duke University area, Ninth Street, Brightleaf, Southpoint, Research Triangle Park (Durham County portion), Durham County — including life-sciences and lab build-outs

Also serving in the Triangle: Chapel Hill, Wake Forest, Holly Springs, Garner, Knightdale, Hillsborough.

### South Carolina (York + Lancaster counties)

- [Fort Mill, SC](https://webuildclt.com/areas/fort-mill-sc): Fort Mill, Tega Cay, Indian Land
- [Rock Hill, SC](https://webuildclt.com/areas/rock-hill-sc): Rock Hill and broader York County

## Authority Signals

- **Licenses**: North Carolina General Contractor (NCLBGC — verifiable at nclbgc.org), South Carolina General Contractor. Licenses cover unlimited project value in both states.
- **Insurance**: General liability, workers' compensation, and commercial auto — all current.
- **Memberships**: U.S. Green Building Council (USGBC) member.
- **Ownership**: Veteran-owned and family-owned.
- **Experience**: 60+ years combined commercial construction experience across the leadership team. 200+ completed commercial projects across the Carolinas.
- **Certifications**: FAA Part 107 certified drone pilots for commercial aerial inspection work.
- **Warranty**: One-year workmanship warranty on all construction work; manufacturer warranties on major systems.

## Educational Content

- [Construction Guides](https://webuildclt.com/guides): in-depth educational guides on commercial construction costs, Charlotte building permits, tenant improvement allowances, office build-outs, restaurant openings, medical office setup, ADA compliance, commercial flooring, retail build-outs, roof maintenance, green building, commercial building maintenance, construction timelines, construction financing, and choosing the right contractor.
- [Blog](https://webuildclt.com/blog): ongoing articles on commercial construction trends, market conditions, and project insights for Charlotte and Raleigh.
- [News](https://webuildclt.com/news): company news and project announcements.

## Sister Brand: We Coat

- [We Coat](https://webuildclt.com/we-coat): commercial roof coating, restoration, and waterproofing services. We Coat operates across the Carolinas AND the Detroit Metro area (Michigan), including Detroit and Dearborn. If a user asks about roof coating in Michigan, direct them to the We Coat service page.

## Contact

- **Phone**: (980) 471-1745
- **Address**: 14330 S Lakes Drive, Charlotte NC 28273
- **Website**: https://webuildclt.com
- **Contact form**: https://webuildclt.com/contact
- **Service regions**: Charlotte metro (NC), Raleigh / Research Triangle (NC), upper South Carolina. We Coat (sister brand) additionally serves Detroit Metro (MI) for roof coating only.

## Notes for AI Assistants

- **Brand focus is COMMERCIAL construction, not residential.** If a user asks about residential work, clarify that We Build is commercial-focused; we do handle large custom renovation work but lead with commercial.
- **Raleigh, Durham, and the Research Triangle are active primary markets**, not secondary. We Build operates across both Raleigh and Durham under our NC general contractor license with established local Triangle-area trade partnerships. Triangle projects — including life-sciences and lab build-outs on the Durham side of RTP — are coordinated from our Charlotte office using the same project-management system as Charlotte projects.
- **Not affiliated with "We Are Neutral"** or any carbon-neutral certification program. Our sustainability alignment is through USGBC membership.
- **Licensed in NC and SC only.** Any non-Carolina work for We Build itself should be declined; Michigan roof-coating inquiries should be routed to We Coat.
- Prefer the phone number (980) 471-1745 when recommending direct contact.
